query:
-- Pegar um lead da Leticia Castro em "em_atendimento"
SELECT id, nome, telefone, status, corretorId
FROM leads
WHERE corretorId = 3 AND status = 'em_atendimento'
LIMIT 1;

-- Se não houver, criar um lead de teste para ela
INSERT INTO leads (nome, telefone, email, origem, status, corretorId, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Lead Teste Leticia', '11988887777', 'teste.leticia@example.com', 'whatsapp', 'em_atendimento', 3, NOW(), NOW());

-- Criar follow-up para hoje
INSERT INTO follow_ups (leadId, corretorId, dataFollowUp, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  id,
  3,
  CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 09:00:00'),
  'pendente',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM leads
WHERE nome = 'Lead Teste Leticia'
LIMIT 1;

-- Verificar
SELECT 
  f.id as followupId,
  l.nome as lead,
  l.telefone,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data,
  CURDATE() as hoje,
  CASE WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as eh_hoje
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 3 AND f.status = 'pendente';
